LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedleProcedure.label: perform pneumothorax needle decompression
LanguageData.PneumothoraxNeedleProcedure.description: Perform needle decompression on a collapsed lung to relieve pressure. This temporarily stops the pneumothorax from worsening.
LanguageData.PneumothoraxRemovalSurgery.label: perform pneumothorax removal surgery
LanguageData.PneumothoraxRemovalSurgery.description: Perform surgery to completely remove the pneumothorax by draining accumulated air and sealing the lung. Requires anesthesia and consumes 1 medicine.
